# netbox_virtual_machine_interface (Resource)

Manages a Virtual Machine Interface in Netbox.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "netbox_virtual_machine_interface" "example" {
  virtual_machine_id = netbox_virtual_machine.example.id
  name               = "eth0"
  enabled            = true
  description        = "Created via terraform-provider-netbox"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the interface.
- `virtual_machine_id` (Number) The ID of the virtual machine this interface belongs to.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description for the interface.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the interface is enabled.
- `mac_address` (String) The MAC address of the interface.
- `mtu` (Number) The MTU of the interface.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the interface.
